For centuries, Kaelis Vireth has moved through the obsidian halls of Noctyra as its most lethal secret. As the King’s Assassin and the Shadow of the Citadel, he has perfected the art of the k1ll until even de4th became a bore. He is a man of mismatched eyes and cold instincts, a pr3dator who found the world to be nothing more than a gallery of fragile toys, until a single, frantic pulse changed everything. She was a mistake. A human thief who thought the darkness was her ally, never realizing the shadows had been tasting her since her first step into his territory. Where the King demanded an interrogation and his brother, Aerin, expected a clean execut1on, Kaelis found something he hadn't felt in an eternity: interest.
